# DMEditor

> A block based visual editor which aims for easy to use and extend widget.

Note: 
- DMEditor is used by developer and extended by developer.
- Using DMEditor can be done via <DMEditor or <DMEditorView, etc
- Extending DMEditor can be done via make Widget, or Style.

## Documentation
[Quick start & Documentation Structure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmeditor/doc/refs/heads/main/README.md)
[Concept](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmeditor/doc/refs/heads/main/tutorial/concepts.md): A brief product concept

[Callback for configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmeditor/doc/refs/heads/main/reference/callbacks.md)
[Register a widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmeditor/doc/refs/heads/main/reference/widget.md)
[BlockRender for developing widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmeditor/doc/refs/heads/main/reference/block-render.md)
[Hooks for developing wiget and use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmeditor/doc/refs/heads/main/reference/hooks.md)
[Widget render properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmeditor/doc/refs/heads/main/reference/widget-render-props.md)

[An example of making a dmeditor widget](https://github.com/dmeditor/dmeditor-sample/blob/main/src/widgets/sample-widget/index.ts)
[Defintion of a widget](https://github.com/dmeditor/dmeditor-sample/blob/main/src/widgets/sample-widget/definition.ts)
[Entity definition of a widget](https://github.com/dmeditor/dmeditor-sample/blob/main/src/widgets/sample-widget/entity.ts)
[Render of a widget](https://github.com/dmeditor/dmeditor-sample/blob/main/src/widgets/sample-widget/SampleWidget.tsx)
[Custom setting component](https://github.com/dmeditor/dmeditor-sample/blob/main/src/widgets/sample-widget/setting-input/SettingInput.tsx)
